query:
-- Deletar os registros duplicados (manter o de menor ID)
DELETE FROM event_participation WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT ep.id, ep.eventId, ep.alunoId,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ep.eventId, ep.alunoId ORDER BY ep.id) as rn
    FROM event_participation ep
    WHERE (ep.eventId = 30010 AND ep.alunoId = 30073)
       OR (ep.eventId = 30013 AND ep.alunoId = 30071)
       OR (ep.eventId = 30005 AND ep.alunoId = 30031)
  ) sub WHERE rn > 1
);

DELETE FROM event_participation WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT ep.id, ep.eventId, ep.alunoId,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ep.eventId, ep.alunoId ORDER BY ep.id) as rn
    FROM event_participation ep
    WHERE (ep.eventId = 30010 AND ep.alunoId = 30073)
       OR (ep.eventId = 30013 AND ep.alunoId = 30071)
       OR (ep.eventId = 30005 AND ep.alunoId = 30031)
  ) sub WHERE rn > 1
);
